lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I use the agility course?

lines.speaker: Agility Boss
lines.text: I'll throw you a stick, which you need to fetch as quickly as possible, from the area beyond the pipes.

lines.speaker: Agility Boss
lines.text: Be wary of the deathslide - you must hang by your teeth, and if your strength is not up to the job you will fall into a pit of spikes. Also, I would advise not carrying too much extra weight.

lines.speaker: Agility Boss
lines.text: Bring the stick back to the werewolf waiting at the end of the death slide to get your agility bonus.

lines.speaker: Agility Boss
lines.text: I will throw your stick as soon as you jump onto the first stone.

sections.title: When not wearing the ring of Charos

lines.speaker: Agility Boss
lines.text: Grrr - you don't belong in here, human!

sections.title: When jumping on the first stepping stone
When jumping on the first stepping stone while carrying a stick

lines.speaker: Agility Boss
lines.text: Why didn't you hand the stick over?!!?
